greeting.text: Hi, I'm Charlie. I build electronics, which means I get very excited about tiny parts doing exact jobs.

dialogue_tree.text: Bring copper wire, components, and circuit boards. I can craft wiring harnesses, sensors, and controller kits.
I may stare at a circuit for five minutes without blinking. That means I'm thinking, not broken.
